title: phlegmariurus ciliatospiculatus
intro: Phlegmariurus ciliatospiculatus, also known as the ciliate spiny club moss, is a plant species belonging to the family Lycopodiaceae, a group of ancient and primitive vascular plants. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing sore throats, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Phlegmariurus ciliatospiculatus are often made by infusing the plant in hot water or mixing it with other herbs to create teas or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
